search_query: where do ny lottery proceeds go
combined_text: Does the New York lottery money really go to schools? Georgia Anchikites, on right, buying a mega millions ticket from Lisa Gray, left, at Rocky's, Syracuse, NY. By Dick Blume | dblume@syracuse.com Albany, NY - The New York State Lottery advertises that all proceeds go to the schools. Readers ask us again and again if that is true. Hey, you never know,
